review_text: I had a great experience through and through with Idalia! She was very informative and helpful with explaining the process. We did complete a test spot and I had a great result!  I have been working with Cheri since Idalia left (maybe close to a year now) and she is absolutely AMAZING!! So sweet, so knowledgeable, and great with communication. I canNOT wait until this tattoo is gone and I know she will make sure of it!!
_fix_note: Corrected — original query hit "Houston Tattoo Removal Clinic" instead of Rejuvatek Aesthetics

review_text: Had the pleasure of working with Idalia on my tattoo removal and I just want to say that this was the best experience I could have asked for. I imagined it would be painful like laser but it did not hurt at all. It was a bit uncomfortable but certainly not worse than getting a tattoo. The studio is clean and located in Houston so the drive wasn't bad from the River Oaks area. I have already recommended inkout to several family members. Inkout is awesome!!! Loving my results!!

review_text: I love this location! I’ve had this treatment done a few times before and I’ve been waiting for one to open nearby! The technicians are amazing, she walked me through the whole process it was easy peezy! I would recommend to anyone searching for tattoo removal especially as an alternative to laser.

review_text: Ms. Idalia and Michelle were kind and very professional, it felt like we had been going there for years and the service was amazing!

review_text: Idalia was very sweet and did a great job working on my tattoo removal. We are one session in and I’m excited to see how the process progresses. This is a great location and I’m excited that this removal option has moved to the Houston area as I used to have to drive to Austin for it.
